sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports trying to avoid pie because of sugar. The patient reports a headache. The patient reports body aches. The patient reports chills. The patient reports dizziness. The patient reports left hand pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness. The doctor suspects Lyme disease based on the presentation.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends continuing the patient on lisinopril. The doctor recommends continuing the patient on metformin. The doctor orders a basic metabolic panel. The doctor orders a lipid panel. The doctor orders Doxycycline. The doctor orders Lisinopril. The doctor orders Metformin.
